description: Court record approving a payment for Ya'aqov Berakah the cantor b. Moshe for his service in communal prayers for five years. Dated Tuesday, 12th Nisan 5402. Dated 12 Nisan 5402 AM (1642 CE). Signed by Avraham Qrūdī/Qrīdī Levi, Barūkh Ṣevi(?) Nasi and Aharon Mu'amar/Miʿmār.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
